title: drop TIER-APP-COMPLETE from kpi worker
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
- legacy app-submission completion label is being retired
- all ~270 historical `TIER-APP-COMPLETE` issues have been migrated to `TIER-APP-APPROVED` so the KPI worker still finds them via the existing `TIER-APP-APPROVED` query
- remove `TIER-APP-COMPLETE` from the query list in [apps/operation/kpi/src/worker/index.ts](apps/operation/kpi/src/worker/index.ts)
- the label itself will be deleted from the repo after this merges

gist.headline: Spring Cleaning the KPIs
gist.blurb: We've retired the legacy TIER-APP-COMPLETE label and migrated historical issues to keep our KPI tracking clean and tidy.
gist.summary: Removed the legacy TIER-APP-COMPLETE label from the KPI worker query after migrating 270 historical issues to TIER-APP-APPROVED.
gist.impact: This simplifies internal tracking for app submissions without affecting historical data.
gist.visual_concept: The bee (Polly) and Nomnom creature cleaning up old labels/tags. Nomnom eating old 'COMPLETE' tags while Polly holds a shiny new 'APPROVED' stamp.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and the round tan Nomnom creature doing spring cleaning in a digital garden. Nomnom is happily eating old dusty pixelated tags, while the bee holds a shiny new stamp. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
